Lot FB-2026-004 has only 2,100 seeds and is rated condition C. Bank policy requires maintaining at least 1,500 seeds for condition C lots. Transferring 1,000 would leave 1,100, below the threshold.

Conservation measure — the species (Baptisia australis, blue false indigo) is regionally declining and the curator wanted a backup in case of a Vault 2 refrigeration event. The germination rate was good (68%).
No — the curator explicitly states the split is a conservation measure, not a viability concern

Failed viability testing (38% germination, reclassified to D), scheduled for deaccession at the next monthly review. Not yet formally deaccessioned as of April 30.
